curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. The patch commit (merge of PR #1624) updated the vendored nats-io/jwt/v2 library to add nil checks in Export.Validate, Exports.Validate, Import.Validate, and Imports.Validate. It also reordered issuer trust checks in server/accounts.go (checkActivation) and server/server.go (verifyAccountClaims) to run before calling Validate. The user_claims.go change (adding a connection type constant) is unrelated to the security fix. Five non-test source files were modified making this a noisy patch. Locations derived from the patch diff; the advisory does not name specific files or functions. Pre-assigned vulnerability class null-deref confirmed by CWE-476, advisory description, and patch diff.
